nasb.text: It is the Lord of hosts whom you should regard as holy. And He shall be your fear, And He shall be your dread.

esv.text: But the Lord of hosts, him you shall honor as holy. Let him be your fear, and let him be your dread.

cnv.text: 你們要尊萬軍之耶和華為聖， 他是你們當怕的， 也是你們當畏懼的。

ccb.text: 你们当尊万军之耶和华为圣，当敬畏祂，畏惧祂。

csbs.text: 万军之耶和华是你们要尊为圣的， 他才是你们要怕的，也是你们要畏惧的。
